---
title: "Research Assistant"
description: "Collected, organized, and analyzed complex ecological datasets using spatial and statistical methods."
org: "Northern Kentucky University"
org-url: "https://www.nku.edu/"
date: "2020-02-01"
dates: "Feb 2020 – May 2022"
location: "Highland Heights, KY"
categories: [Experience]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://www.nku.edu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Northern Kentucky University</a> · Feb 2020 – May 2022 · Highland Heights, KY
:::

As an undergraduate research assistant at Northern Kentucky University, I worked with complex ecological datasets using spatial and statistical methods.

- Collected, organized, and analyzed ecological datasets.
- Applied spatial and statistical methods to research questions.
- Contributed to conservation-focused ecological research.
